message.content:
@startuml
title Mengubah SubMenu

actor Administrator
participant "Dashboard_V" as DashboardV #D3E5F2
participant "Submenu_V" as SubmenuV #D3E5F2
participant "EditSubmenu_V" as EditSubmenuV #D3E5F2
control Admin_C #FFDDCC
boundary Menu_C #FFE6B8
entity Submenu_E #CCE0DB

Administrator -> DashboardV : 1 load->view()
activate DashboardV
return to Administrator : 2 Halaman Dashboard
deactivate DashboardV

Administrator -> DashboardV : 3 klik menu Submenu management
activate DashboardV
DashboardV -> Menu_C : 4 Submenu()
activate Menu_C
Menu_C -> Submenu_E : 5 
activate Submenu_E
Submenu_E --> Menu_C : 6 
deactivate Submenu_E
Menu_C -> SubmenuV : 7 load->view()
activate SubmenuV
return from SubmenuV to Administrator : 8 Halaman Submenu management
deactivate SubmenuV
deactivate Menu_C
deactivate DashboardV

Administrator -> SubmenuV : 9 klik tombol EditSubMenu
activate SubmenuV
SubmenuV -> Menu_C : 10 EditSubMenu()
activate Menu_C
Menu_C -> EditSubmenuV : 11 load->view()
activate EditSubmenuV
return from EditSubmenuV to Administrator : 12 Halaman EditSubMenu
deactivate EditSubmenuV
deactivate Menu_C
deactivate SubmenuV

note right of Administrator\nInputan Submenu\end note

Administrator -> EditSubmenuV : 13 Mengisi Inputan dan klik tombol edit
activate EditSubmenuV
EditSubmenuV -> Menu_C : 14 EditSubMenu()
activate Menu_C
Menu_C -> Submenu_E : 15 

alt [isValid() case]
    activate Submenu_E
    return from Submenu_E to Menu_C : 16 isValid()
    deactivate Submenu_E
    
    Menu_C -> SubmenuV : 17 load->view()
    
    return from SubmenuV to Administrator : 18 Halaman Submenu
else [isInvalid() case]
    activate Submenu_E
    return from Submenu_E to Menu_C : 19 isInValid()
    deactivate Submenu_E
    
    Menu_C -> EditSubmenuV : 20 load->view()
    
    return from EditSubmenuV to Administrator : 21 Halaman Edit Submenu
end

@enduml
